risks.title: Removing CMD_OPTIONS widget leaves user with no per-command override for project-dir
risks.mitigation: The top-level Project Dir field already provides this. The CMD_OPTIONS widget was the duplicate — removal does not reduce capability.

decision_records.decision: Remove --project-dir entry from CMD_OPTIONS['rag-search'], rely on PROJECT_DIR_FLAG_CMDS auto-injection
decision_records.rationale: Keeps routing logic in one place (the routing sets), avoids confusion about which field wins. Alternative — remove rag-search from PROJECT_DIR_FLAG_CMDS and keep the CMD_OPTIONS widget — would require the user to manually fill a per-command field rather than using the shared Project Dir, degrading UX.
